basic_details.job_title: CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 23 Project Associate, Research Associate and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Institute of Himalayan Bioresource Technology (CSIR IHBT)
basic_details.post_name: Project Associate , Senior Research Fellow , Research Associate , Project Scientist
basic_details.short_information: The Institute of Himalayan Bioresource Technology (CSIR IHBT) has officially announced the Project Associate, Senior Research Fellow, Research Associate, and Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 with 23 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. 08/2026 on the official CSIR IHBT website. Candidates meeting the age criteria, including relaxations for SC/ST/PwBD/Women (5 years) and OBC (3 years), and holding relevant qualifications such as M.Sc., M.Pharm, Ph.D., or Master's degrees in Biological Sciences, Biotechnology, Agriculture, Food Technology, Chemistry, or rel

age_limit.details: Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years, OBC: 3 years.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Food Technology/ Food Science/ Food and Nutrition/ Nutrition and Dietetics, Masters in Chemistry / Biochemistry/ Phytochemistry/ Organic Chemistry/ M. Pharmacy, Masters in Biochemistry or Molecular Biology or Life/ Biological Sciences/Biotechnology or Phytochemistry or M. Pharmacy, M.Sc in Biotechnology/ Plant Biotechnology/ Life Sciences/ Molecular Biology and Biotechnology/ Botany, M.Sc. in Botany, Plant Physiology with 3 years experience, M.Sc. in Botany, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Ph.D. in Biological Science/ Biotechnology, Biochemistry/ Botany, Doctoral Degree in Science or Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology, Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / MVSc or bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine, M.Sc. in Statistics/ Agri-economics /Agriculture Extension / Agribusiness Management, Master degree in Agriculture (Agronomy, soil science, genetics & Plant Breeding) or Horticulture, Master degree in Life Science/ Biological Sciences/ Biotechnology/ Botany/ Agriculture/ Horticulture/ Chemistry/ Chemical Science /Food Science & Technology, MBA/ M.Sc. Agriculture Economics
qualification.details: Project Associate PAT-I (Post Code 8001): M.Sc. in Food Technology/ Food Science/ Food and Nutrition/ Nutrition and Dietetics from a recognized University. Desirable: Work experience in food product development and analysis. Project Associate PAT-I (Post Code 8002): Masters/ Integrated Master’s degree in Chemistry / Biochemistry/ Phytochemistry/ Organic Chemistry/ M. Pharmacy from a recognized University. Desirable: Working Knowledge in Natural Product Chemistry, in vitro cell lines and animal handling. Project Associate PAT-I (Post Code 8003): Masters/ Integrated Master degree in Biochemistry or Molecular Biology or Life/ Biological Sciences/Biotechnology or Phytochemistry or M. Pharmacy from a recognized University. Desirable: Working Knowledge in in vitro cell culture-based assays and handling of experimental animals. Project Associate PAT-I (Post Code 8004): M.Sc in Biotechnology/ Plant Biotechnology/ Life Sciences/ Molecular Biology and Biotechnology/ Botany from a recognized University. Desirable: Work experience in Plant Tissue Culture/ Molecular Biology of Horticulture crops/ Woody plants and proven experience in research publications. Senior Research Fellow (Post Code 8005): M.Sc. in Botany, Plant Physiology from a recognized University with 3 years’ experience in Research and Development. Desirable: Work experience in tissue culture of High altitude medicinal plants with proven research publications. Project Associate PAT-I (Post Code 8006): M.Sc. in Botany, Biotechnology, Biochemistry from a recognized University. Desirable: Experience in Plant molecular Biology, Tissue culture, Gene cloning. Research Associate-I (Post Code 8007): Ph.D. in Biological Science/ Biotechnology, Biochemistry/ Botany from a recognized University. Desirable: Experience in Plant Molecular Biology, Tissue culture, Gene cloning, Genetic Transformation, NGS data analysis, as evident from publications. Project Scientist-I (Post Code 8008): Doctoral Degree in Science or Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University or equivalent. Desirable: Knowledge in plant virology and insect transmission of Plant viruses, protein-protein interaction, proteome characterization. Project Associate-I (Post Code 8009): Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / MVSc or bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent. Desirable: Training or practical knowledge on nucleic acid extraction, construct preparation, PCR, gene cloning, gene silencing. Project Associate PAT-I (Post Code 8010): M.Sc. in Statistics/ Agri-economics /Agriculture Extension / Agribusiness Management from a recognized University. Desirable: Working Knowledge of statistical modelling and handling of large data sets. Project Associate PAT-I (Post Code 8011): Master degree in Agriculture with specialization in Agronomy, soil science and genetics & Plant Breeding Or Master degree in Horticulture from a recognized University. Desirable: Experience in Soil & Plant Analysis and Field Experience in Horticulture, Fruit Crops. Project Associate PAT-I (Post Code 8012): Master degree in Life Science/ Biological Sciences/ Biotechnology/ Botany/ Agriculture/ Horticulture/ Chemistry/ Chemical Science /Food Science & Technology from a recognized University. Desirable: Work Experience/ Diploma/ dissertation in the relevant area. Project Associate PAT-I (Post Code 8013): MBA/ M.Sc. Agriculture Economics from a recognized University. Desirable: Work experience in the Management/ Survey/ Data analysis.

salary_details.project associate pat-i (post code 8001): (a) Rs. 31,000/- + 10% HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or (b) Rs. 25,000/- + 10% HRA
salary_details.project associate pat-i (post code 8004): (a) Rs. 31,000/- + 10% HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or (b) Rs. 25,000/- + 10% HRA
salary_details.project associate pat-i (post code 8006): (a) Rs. 31,000/- + 9% HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or (b) Rs. 25,000/- + 9% HRA
salary_details.project associate-i (post code 8009): (a) Rs. 31,000/- + 9% HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or (b) Rs. 25,000/- + 9% HRA
salary_details.project associate pat-i (post code 8010): (a) Rs. 31,000/- + 10% HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or (b) Rs. 25,000/- + 10% HRA

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR IHBT Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by CSIR IHBT?
faq.answer: CSIR IHBT has announced a total of 23 vacancies for the positions of Project Associate, Senior Research Fellow, Research Associate, and Project Scientist.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview dates are scheduled from 15th June 2026 to 19th June 2026, with specific dates for different post codes.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Associate posts ranges from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 31,000/- per month, plus HRA, depending on qualification and NET/GATE status.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Scientist-I post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for Project Scientist-I is a Doctoral Degree in Science or a Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University or equivalent.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age relaxation provided for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Age relaxation is provided as 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at the CSIR IHBT office in Palampur, Himachal Pradesh (PIN: 176061).

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any specific qualification for Senior Research Fellow?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Senior Research Fellow position, an M.Sc. in Botany, Plant Physiology with 3 years of experience in R&D is required, with a preference for experience in tissue culture of High altitude medicinal plants.
